name: reentrancy-benign
text:
Reentrancy in RealEstateNotary.safeMint(address,string) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4745-4758):
	External calls:
	- _safeMint(to,tokenId) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4754)
		- ERC721Utils.checkOnERC721Received(_msgSender(),address(0),to,tokenId,data) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#3952)
		- retval = IERC721Receiver(to).onERC721Received(operator,from,tokenId,data) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#1077-1091)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _setTokenURI(tokenId,uri) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4755)
		- $ = ERC721URIStorageStorageLocation (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4605)

name: reentrancy-events
text:
Reentrancy in RealEstateNotary.safeMint(address,string) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4745-4758):
	External calls:
	- _safeMint(to,tokenId) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4754)
		- ERC721Utils.checkOnERC721Received(_msgSender(),address(0),to,tokenId,data) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#3952)
		- retval = IERC721Receiver(to).onERC721Received(operator,from,tokenId,data) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#1077-1091)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- MetadataUpdate(tokenId) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4647)
		- _setTokenURI(tokenId,uri) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4755)

name: use-custom-error-not-require
text: Consider using custom errors as they are more gas efficient while allowing developers  to describe the error in detail using NatSpec.

name: use-prefix-increment-not-postfix
text: Consider using the prefix increment expression whenever the return value is not needed. The prefix increment expression is cheaper in terms of gas.

name: use-multiple-require
text: Using multiple require statements is cheaper than using && multiple check combinations.  There are more advantages, such as easier to read code and better coverage reports.
